name: daghistory_append
briefDescription: New node appended to DAG with given parents .

name: daghistory_ancestors
briefDescription: Topologically ordered list of all ancestor nodes .

name: daghistory_common_ancestor
briefDescription: Nearest common ancestor of nodes a and b .

name: daghistory_descendants
briefDescription: All descendant nodes in topological order .

name: daghistory_between
briefDescription: Nodes on the path from ancestor to descendant , inclusive .
